turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Hey, yeah, hi.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Esta llamada puede ser grabada para motivos de calidad y entrenamiento. Para Español, oprima el 2.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: part of pretty good AI.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Am I speaking with Richard?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, this is Richard. I'm actually calling 'cause I need to set up an appointment for my right knee.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please provide your data first.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sure, it's August 4th, 2000.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks, Richard.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Is this appointment for a new issue with your right knee or is it a follow-up for a previous visit?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: It's a new issue, started a few weeks ago after a run.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you describe your knee issue as urgent or causing significant pain?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Or is it more of a routine concern?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: I mean, it aches on the inside and it clicks when I bend it, so it’s definitely bothering me, not just routine.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Do you have a provider you'd like to see or are you open to the first available?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: I’m open to the first available, yeah.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Let me check for the soonest available appointments for your knee issue.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: One moment.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sure, no problem.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: What would you like to do?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: It appears you already have an appointment scheduled for this same me issue. If you'd like, I can help you reschedule or cancel that appointment, or I can connect you to a team member for further help.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Wait, I don’t think I have anything booked. Are you sure there’s an appointment on file?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Take your time. Let me know how you'd like to proceed when you're ready.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, I really just want to get a new appointment set up, 'cause I don’t think I have one.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Just to clarify, you don't have an appointment yet for this me issue?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like me to connect you to a team member to sort this out?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: If we can just set up a new appointment right now, that’d be great.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I'm unable to book a new appointment for this issue because the system shows one already exists.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I can connect you to a team member who can help sort this out and make sure you get the care you need.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like me to transfer you now?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, go ahead and transfer me.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I can't book a new appointment for your right knee through the system right now.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I can connect you to our patient support team for help.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please stay on the line while I transfer you.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Alright,

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: connecting you to a representative.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please wait.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sure, I’ll hold on.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: BEEP

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Hello, you've reached the Pretty Good AI test line.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Goodbye

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Alright, thanks. Take care.
